items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the specific requirement regarding migration tools for field changes. However, the evidence provided does not include any direct references or checks related to migration tools, leading to an inconclusive status. The linked use case outlines various custom fields but does not address the existence or functionality of migration tools, indicating a lack of necessary evidence to confirm this requirement.
